name: REPPUUTSUKI NO JUTSU (VIOLENT WIND THRUST TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
You concentrate Chakra in the air, creating a potent gust of wind that can do one of two things:

Disarm - Make a ranged touch attack against a target weapon. If it hits, you may make a disarm attempt, gaining a +4 circumstance bonus to the check, without risking being disarmed yourself. The gust of wind counts as though you wield a Medium-sized weapon.

Violent Thrust - Make a ranged touch attack against a Medium-sized or smaller target, throwing it 1d6 x 5 ft in a direction of your choice (halved upwards, doubled downwards). If the subject collides with an object of its own size or larger, it suffers 3d6 fall damage. A Large creature can be affected as well, though it is only thrown 1d4 x 5 ft. A successful save halves the distance the subject is thrown, and halves the collision damage (if any). The collision can be made to do nonlethal damage, though you incur a -4 penalty to the touch attack and save DC if you choose to do so.

Empower: Spend 2 Chakra to gain a +2 bonus to either the disarm check (Disarm) or to the roll to determine the distance the target is thrown (Violent Thrust), up to +10 total. Each such bonus also increases the collision damage by 1d6 (maximum 1d6 per level).
